thought: I keep the promotional_art composition completely locked to the first frame and do not turn it into a free camera battle scene. The external motion reference is blended only into the embedded gameplay inside the central split battle panel: fixed top-down auto-combat rhythm, increasing projectile density from 00:02-00:08 style, small frequent hit sparks, and a short escalation beat rather than hard cuts. I use subtle parallax, glow pulses, and stable ad-layout animation so the poster structure, slogan position, mascot placement, and center-to-right/upward action flow all remain faithful to the source frame. Following the 'slow is smooth' rule, character motions stay limited to looping point/hover poses and controlled enemy knockback arcs. Physics feedback is expressed through readable impact cycles inside the panel: projectile travel, contact spark, enemy recoil, floating damage numbers, coin drops, and a slightly farther launched enemy on the upper-right. I selected only the essential 8 assets including the required first frame and reference video, staying under the 9-asset limit while covering panel battle VFX, mascot motion, airborne monster reaction, damage UI, explosion escalation, loot drops, and logo/text glow.
prompt_en: First Frame: @5f91a8442d31ad86511c1cf4ad68885a.png. Reference Video: @trimmed_best_ref_1774792395.mp4. Motion Style Reference: adopt the fixed high-angle auto-battle rhythm from the reference video, especially the 00:02-00:08 escalation pattern with continuous projectile travel, denser enemy pressure, frequent small hit sparks, and a short danger spike, while preserving the exact promotional poster composition, center gameplay panel, right-side mascot, bottom slogan, and top-right branding from the first frame. [00s-02s] (Background Layer) Hold the original ad layout as a stable first-frame lock, only adding very subtle parallax shimmer and gentle sparkle drift inside the central framed gameplay panel using @promo_battle_panel_fx_sheet_215402.png, bright quirky cartoon style, colorful 2D/3D hybrid stylized, polished poster view, front-facing straight-on composition. (Character/Action Layer) The right mascot mage uses a tiny looping point-and-bounce pose from @right_mage_idle_point_sheet_160433.png, staying anchored at bottom-right with the same silhouette and gesture direction. Embedded battle units inside the center panel continue existing auto-attacks without changing their positions drastically. (VFX Layer) Light fire flicker, soft beam pulses, and tiny impact flashes begin inside both split battle scenes. (UI Layer) A few readable floating damage numbers from @floating_damage_ui_pack_215530.png tick upward over enemies, keeping the ad screen chaotic but readable. [02s-05s] (Background Layer) Keep the poster layout fixed and readable; no camera cut, no scene conversion, only slight depth motion inside the panel. (Character/Action Layer) Strictly follow the combat rhythm of @trimmed_best_ref_1774792395.mp4: enemy pressure inside the embedded gameplay increases, auto-battle timing becomes denser, and the upper-right enemy starts a controlled knockback arc. (VFX Layer) Use @promo_battle_panel_fx_sheet_215402.png and @skill_mutation_explosion_sheet_215618.png to send more diagonal projectiles and compact explosion pops across the center panel from center to right and upward, matching the first-frame flow. Each hit must complete a feedback cycle: projectile crosses, contact spark appears, target recoils, then particles dissipate. (UI Layer) More floating numbers from @floating_damage_ui_pack_215530.png appear in bursts, stacked but legible, with small combo-like pulses. [05s-08s] (Background Layer) The overall advertisement composition still does not move; instead the embedded right-side battle scene becomes the highlighted focus. (Character/Action Layer) The airborne nightmare monster on the upper-right follows a funny, slightly farther outward launch using @nightmare_monster_hit_fly_sheet_215446.png, while the bottom-right mascot’s pointing pose visually aligns with that launched target. Movement remains smooth and non-stiff, with exaggerated cartoon recoil rather than violent realism. (VFX Layer) Trigger a stronger mutation blast using @skill_mutation_explosion_sheet_215618.png: layered candy-colored explosion rings, shockwave glow, sparks, and comic burst shapes around the right-side battle area, with impact force clearly shown through enemy head snap-back and body stagger. Add a few celebratory coin drops using @coin_loot_drop_sheet_215703.png. (UI Layer) Damage numbers briefly surge, then settle; bottom slogan and logo pulse with ad emphasis using @promo_text_logo_glow_ui_215744.png. [08s-10s] (Background Layer) Return to a steadier promotional hold with twinkling highlights and clear screen readability. (Character/Action Layer) The mascot remains in the same anchored pose with a tiny idle settle, while embedded auto-combat continues at a lighter loop. (VFX Layer) Explosion residue fades into sparkles, coins finish dropping, and battle flashes reduce. (UI Layer) The large bottom slogan and logo give one final soft glow pulse using @promo_text_logo_glow_ui_215744.png, preparing a call-to-action feel. Maintain stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, sharp focus, non-stiff movement, no layout drift, 4K ultra HD, cinematic texture, rich details, no jitter.
prompt_zh: > 首帧锁定: @5f91a8442d31ad86511c1cf4ad68885a.png。参考视频: @trimmed_best_ref_1774792395.mp4。动作风格参考: 采用参考视频中固定高视角自动战斗的节奏，尤其吸收 00:02-00:08 段的战斗升温方式：持续弹道穿场、敌群压力增加、频繁小型命中火花、短暂危险升级提示；但必须严格保留首帧宣传海报式构图、中央分屏战斗面板、右下吉祥物法师、底部大字标语、右上品牌元素，以及画面从中心向右上爆发的流向，不可改成自由运镜实战镜头。 [00s-02s] (Background Layer) 完整保持首帧宣传图布局不变，只在中央游戏面板内部加入非常轻微的景深闪烁与细小漂浮亮片，使用 @promo_battle_panel_fx_sheet_215402.png，整体为明亮魔性卡通风、夸张表情、糖果色战斗广告质感。 (Character/Action Layer) 右下角法师使用 @right_mage_idle_point_sheet_160433.png 做轻微点指与小幅上下弹动，位置严格锁定在右下，不改变原始姿态方向。中央面板里的战斗角色延续首帧当前自动攻击状态，不重新开场。 (VFX Layer) 两个分屏战斗区域内出现轻微火焰闪烁、光束脉冲和小型命中特效。 (UI Layer) 使用 @floating_damage_ui_pack_215530.png 在怪物头顶跳出少量可读的伤害飘字，保持“热闹但能看清”。 [02s-05s] (Background Layer) 海报整体依然稳定不动，不切镜，只让中央战斗面板内部产生节奏变化。 (Character/Action Layer) 严格跟随 @trimmed_best_ref_1774792395.mp4 的战斗节拍：中央嵌入战斗中的敌方压力提升，自动攻击频率变密，右上区域的敌怪开始被逐步击飞。 (VFX Layer) 使用 @promo_battle_panel_fx_sheet_215402.png 与 @skill_mutation_explosion_sheet_215618.png，在中央面板内增加更多沿对角线穿越的投射物与紧凑爆炸点，运动方向遵循首帧从中心向右上扩散。每次命中都要形成完整受力反馈：弹道飞行、接触火花、目标后仰踉跄、粒子消散。 (UI Layer) 使用 @floating_damage_ui_pack_215530.png 让伤害数字成批跳出，密集但仍清晰可读，并带一点连击感。 [05s-08s] (Background Layer) 整体广告构图依然锁定不动，把视觉重点转向中央面板右侧战斗区。 (Character/Action Layer) 右上方梦魇怪使用 @nightmare_monster_hit_fly_sheet_215446.png 做搞笑的进一步外抛击飞弧线，右下法师的指向动作与这个被炸飞目标形成呼应。动作要顺滑、夸张、卡通，不做写实暴力。 (VFX Layer) 使用 @skill_mutation_explosion_sheet_215618.png 触发一次更强的技能变异爆炸：糖果色爆炸环、冲击波发光、火花、漫画式爆裂图形集中出现在右侧战斗区，明确表现冲击力，让敌怪出现头部后仰、身体踉跄。再配合 @coin_loot_drop_sheet_215703.png 掉落少量金币，强化割草解压爽感。 (UI Layer) 伤害飘字短暂暴增后回落，底部标语和 logo 使用 @promo_text_logo_glow_ui_215744.png 做一轮强调脉冲发光。 [08s-10s] (Background Layer) 回到更稳定的宣传展示状态，保留细微闪光与清晰可读性。 (Character/Action Layer) 吉祥物法师回到原地轻微待机收势，中央面板自动战斗继续但节奏略微放缓。 (VFX Layer) 爆炸残留逐渐化为亮片，金币落完，命中闪光减少。 (UI Layer) 底部大字标语与 logo 再进行一次柔和发光脉冲，形成明确的广告召唤感。全程保持角色样貌稳定不变形、五官清晰、结构正常、比例自然、动作不僵硬、画面锐利、布局不漂移，4K 超清，电影级卡通质感，细节丰富，无抖动。
